title: Voxyris
description: Seamless combination of Voxy and Iris shaders. Enjoy massive render distance with shaders and great performance!
body: # 📖 About **Voxyris** is a seamless combination of Voxy and Iris shaders. Enjoy massive render distance with shaders and great performance! ### ❓ What is voxy? > Voxy is a mod made by cortex that uses Level of Detail to let you see beyond your normal render distance. ### ⚙️ Requirments > A GPU/IGPU with Opengl 4.6 support (this means very old gpu’s like 10+ years old or Macs don’t work but to make sure your GPU has Opengl 4.6 support you can always check online) --- ### 🛠️ Features: - 🌍 Up to 2048 chunk render distance. - 💡 Shader support. (limited) - 📊 Low memory usage (4GB for 256 chunks). - ⚡ Lightweight & Fully optimized - 🔍 Zooming in retains quality of chunks. --- ### ✨ Shaders Voxy supports only a few shaders, currently I've included 10 shaders, find more here: https://samalando.com/voxy/shaders ![Mountain side screenshot with shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dc6c03830def8b88d4ddd9baee5566880126b8f.webp) --- ### ⚡ Performance Stable ~280 fps With 512 Render distance on **6 year old Laptop Gpu**, and 4GB of allocated ram. Performance will vary depending on your hardware. ![Performance showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a1b0dd42342d1e3d8d121013b89431534ff4cf7.webp) --- ### 🔎 Zoom Voxy adjusts the detail level of chunks depending on how much screen space they actually take up. This means that even if you zoom in from far away, you won't end up looking at massive, single-colored blocks. ![Gif - zoom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zwghPdKt/images/c5b30b8acc59fe2260b47216e38281b0b641c1aa.gif) --- ### 🌍 Extreme render distance voxy can render up to 2048 chunks on each directions. ![render distance 512 showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5af5b7ed798f5e3c42e22bb2e13cb741caba3c01.webp) --- ### 💡 FAQ Q: How to toggle shaders? A: Press "K" to toggle shaders, Press "O" to open shader pack menu or go to Options -> Video Setting -> Shader Packs Q: How to change Voxy's render distance? A: Go to options -> video settings -> Voxy -> Rendering Q: How to change quality of voxy's chunks? A: Go to options -> video settings -> Voxy -> Rendering -> "Pixels^2 of subdivison size" The higher the setting lower the quality. --- ### ❗ Disclaimer Voxy is still in early development. You might run into some stability issues or visual glitches. Shaders may not work as expected. --- ### 🧾 Credits **The Requirements** and **What is Voxy?** sections are quote from the Voxy creator's Discord server. Performance tested on Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-10750H CPU @ 2.60GHz; 16GB 2933MT/s ram (4GB Allocated); NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 Ti 4GB (laptop edition) --- # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server?
